title: Angular Momentum of a Bicycle Wheel
body: A mountain biker takes a jump in a race and goes airborne. The mountain bike is travelling at $$10.0$$ $$\frac{m}{s}$$ before it goes airborne. The mass of the front wheel on the bike is $$750$$ g and has radius $$35$$ cm (model the wheel as a hoop, I=m*r**2).
